description: Agentic OS Lifecycle Hooks: Auto-Bootstrap bei Session-Start, Wrap-Up bei Session-Ende, Completeness-Check bei Stop

hooks.prompt: Check if meaningful work was done this session (code changes, decisions, debugging). If yes: 1) Update .agent-memory/session-summary.md with completed work, open items, and next steps (max 30 lines). 2) Log any unlogged coding iterations to iteration-log.md. 3) If 3+ iterations were done, briefly note key learnings in learnings.md. If nothing meaningful was done, skip silently. Return 'approve' to stop.
